stt.heardError: Tšoarelo, ha kea u utloa. Ka kopo, leka hape.
stt.micAccessError: Ha e khone ho fihlella maekrofounu. Sheba litumello.

error.passwordRequired: Lentsoe la lekunutu lea hlokahala bakeng sa faele e kentsoeng ea .ania
error.noSource: Ha ho mohloli o fanoeng (avatarUrl kapa avatarData)

greetings.0: Lumela! Nka o thusa jwang kajeno?
greetings.1: Lumela! Rea u amohela! Nka u etsetsang?
greetings.2: Ho joang! Ke thabela ho bua le uena!
greetings.3: Lumela! Ke mona ho tla thusa. U hloka eng?
greetings.4: Lumela! U phela joang? Nka ba molemo joang?
